_comment: Example intake for a charity-to-charity DSA. Mirrors the Centrestage Communities Ltd partnership (Kilmarnock-based Scottish charity hosting the MCR Mentoring Programme).

counterparty.legalDescription: a company limited by guarantee registered in Scotland (company number SC295238) and a Scottish charity regulated by the Office of the Scottish Charity Regulator (OSCR), charity number SC039611
counterparty.background: Centrestage works with children, young people and families across East Ayrshire through music, theatre and community-based programmes, supporting confidence, attainment and wellbeing. The Parties have identified an opportunity to extend MCR's 1:1 mentoring to participants in those programmes who would benefit from a carefully matched volunteer mentor.
